---
title: "\'Canon Thomas Taylor of St. Just and the Victoria County History in Cornwall, 1899-1938\'"
---

## \'Canon Thomas Taylor of St. Just and the Victoria County History in Cornwall, 1899-1938\'

**Author:** John Beckett
**Date:** 2011
**Imprint:** <i>Journal of the Royal Institution of Cornwall</i> (2011)

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
